data.title: Pony AI Concludes Stabilization Period for Global Offering
data.description:
TipRanks Cyber Monday Sale

  • Claim 60% off TipRanks Premium for data-backed insights and research tools you need to invest with confidence.
  • Subscribe to TipRanks' Smart Investor Picks and see our data in action through our high-performing model portfolio - now also 60% off

Pony AI Inc. ( (HK:2026) ) has issued an announcement.

Pony AI Inc. announced the conclusion of the stabilization period for its Global Offering on December 3, 2025, with Goldman Sachs (Asia) L.L.C. acting as the Stabilizing Manager. The stabilization actions included over-allocations of Class A Ordinary Shares and borrowing shares to cover these over-allocations. The over-allotment option was not exercised and has lapsed. This announcement highlights the company’s compliance with Hong Kong’s regulatory requirements and the challenges posed by its weighted voting rights structure, which may impact shareholder influence.

The most recent analyst rating on (HK:2026) stock is a Buy with a HK$164.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pony AI Inc. stock, see the HK:2026 Stock Forecast page.

More about Pony AI Inc.

Pony AI Inc. is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability and is controlled through weighted voting rights. It operates in the technology sector, focusing on autonomous driving solutions, and has equity securities listed and traded in the United States.

Average Trading Volume: 1,371,321

The latest announcement is out from Dashan Education Holdings Limited ( (HK:9986) ).

Dashan Education Holdings Limited announced the resignation of Mr. Zhang Hongjun from his roles as Executive Director and Chairman, among other positions, effective December 1, 2025. The resignation is due to Mr. Zhang’s desire to focus on other commitments, and there were no disagreements with the Board. Additionally, trading of the company’s shares has been temporarily halted pending a clarification announcement regarding a restriction notice related to the company’s shares.
